THIS MATTER CAME ON CALENDAR FOR THE COURT AND COUNSEL TO DISCUSS HOW TO PROCEED WITH THE DISPOSITION OF TRIAL. JAMES P. GREEN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. TEDDY TSAO-WU APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. THE COURT STATED THE TWO OPTIONS AVAILABLE: 1. DECLARE MISTRIAL AND 2. A TRANSCRIPT OF TRIAL WILL BE PREPARED AT THE COURT'S EXPENSE, PARTIES STIPULATE TO WHAT WILL BE SUBMITTED, AND THE CASE WILL BE RE-ASSIGNED TO ANOTHER JUDGE FOR REVIEW AND DECISION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-15-2012 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-29-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206 TO ALLOW TIME FOR COUNSEL TO CONSULT WITH THEIR CLIENTS. PARTIES TO SUBMIT A STIPULATION WITH CLIENTS' SIGNATURES, IF ANY IS REACHED, AT THE NEXT HEARING. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
